name: MetalCorp Limited
summary: MetalCorp Limited, a junior exploration company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and evaluation of mineral properties in the Northwestern Ontario region of Canada. It explores for gold, copper, zinc, silver, molybdenum, rhenium, platinum, diamond, and base metals. The company has 100% interests in the Hemlo East, Greater North Rock, Black Bear, Big Lake, Pickle Lake, and River Gold and Moly properties. MetalCorp Limited was founded in 2002 and is based in Thunder Bay, Canada.
